tasks.description: Implemented comprehensive version tracking and changelog system for behavior_rules, plus assistant learning log
tasks.approach: Created modular system with separate components: CHANGELOG.md for change tracking, VERSION.md for version registry, track_versions.py for automated version management, assistant_learning.py for AI assistant self-improvement tracking

what_worked: Modular approach separating changelog, version registry, and learning 40_operations/logs
Following Keep a Changelog format for industry standard
Creating reusable Python scripts for automation
Separating assistant learning from agent learning 40_operations/logs
insights: Version tracking is critical for maintaining large rule systems
Separate learning logs allow different optimization strategies
Automated version scanning reduces manual errors
